overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt running through a dark forest at night. The character traverses a winding dirt path from open grassy hillsides into increasingly dense pine woodland with atmospheric low lighting and cool blue-green tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily along the forest path, moving through open terrain with swords visible on his back

entered.detail: rolling green terrain with patches of grass and low vegetation
tall evergreen pine trees scattered across the landscape
narrow winding dirt trail through the grass
dark mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt running along a dirt path through open grassy hillsides at night. Scattered pine trees dot the landscape while distant mountains are visible on the horizon. The terrain is relatively open with partial sky visibility, creating an atmospheric but exposed feeling.

scene_state.functional_zone: denser forest with taller pines and rocky outcrops

events.description: entering denser forest area with taller trees and reduced sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the winding path as the forest becomes denser and more enclosed

entered.detail: tall closely-packed pine trees forming a darker forest canopy
rocky outcrops and boulders along the hillside
leafless dead tree trunk standing among the pines

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a denser forest section with taller pines blocking most of the sky. Rocky outcrops appear along the right side of the path, and the terrain feels more enclosed. The lighting becomes slightly darker as the tree canopy thickens.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest path with dense tree cover and distant camp

events.description: distant camp structures or tents become visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: running deeper into the forest, approaching what appears to be a camp or clearing in the distance

entered.detail: white tent-like structures visible in the distance through the trees
low-lying fog or mist hovering over the forest floor in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the deepest part of the forest where the path becomes narrow and enclosed by dense trees blocking the sky entirely. Low mist appears on the forest floor ahead, and distant camp structures become visible through the trees, suggesting an approaching destination or point of interest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt runs along a dirt path that transforms from open, moonlit hillsides into a claustrophobic, misty forest. It begins across an exposed landscape of grassy slopes and scattered pine trees with distant mountains visible on the horizon. As the path winds forward, the environment shifts into a denser woodland where taller pines begin to block the sky and rocky outcrops emerge along the roadside. The scene then closes in further as the canopy thickens and the lighting darkens, eventually leading into the deepest part of the forest where the path narrows and low mist clings to the ground. Finally, the camera pushes through the dense trees to reveal distant camp structures emerging from the gloom.
